label: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs

node.label: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs
node.definition: Models learn maps between functions or satisfy differential constraints, enabling learned simulators and surrogate PDE solvers.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is modeled as depending on Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers and feeding downstream nodes such as Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting.
examples: atlas downstream link to Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
atlas downstream link to Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.

dependencies.rationale: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms.
In this atlas graph, Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs has a `composes` dependency on Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs has a `trained_under` dependency on Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs has a `composes` dependency on Equivariance, invariance & geometric priors with `common` strength.
